title: Regenerate creative as new aries_run (NOT back-step)

request_body.source_run_id: string (optional; falls back to latest stage run_id from runtime doc)

success_response_body.new_run_id: string (NEW aries_run_id, MUST differ from source_run_id)

error_responses.400 missing_source_run_id: no source_run_id in body and no run_id in runtime doc stages
error_responses.502 regenerate_run_collision: Hermes returned same aries_run_id as source (defensive)

metis_decision_implementation.decision: Regenerate = NEW aries_run (NOT back-step on existing run)
metis_decision_implementation.rationale: callback handler rejects stage regression; reusing the existing run id would re-trigger applyHermesMarketingCallback's late/duplicate/out-of-order guard at backend/marketing/hermes-callbacks.ts:289-297
implementation: createExecutionRunRecord generates a fresh `arun_<uuid>` for every HermesMarketingPort.invoke() call - guaranteed unique aries_run_id per regenerate
regenerateCreative context (source_run_id, source_creative_id) propagated to Hermes through SocialContentWeeklyRequest.input.regenerate_creative AND callback_context.regenerate_creative
applyHermesMarketingCallback in backend/marketing/hermes-callbacks.ts UNCHANGED - confirms NO callback regression behavior modified
Source creative_assets row is preserved - regenerate path never deletes or mutates creative_assets; superseded_by linkage remains future work for the moment the new creative arrives via callback

asserts: regenerateCreativeAsNewRun returns submitted with NEW aries_run_id != source_run_id (test 1)
source_run_id inferred from runtime doc stages when omitted (test 2)
cross-tenant access rejected at helper layer (kind=tenant_mismatch, no port call) (test 3)
POST route returns 202 with new_run_id !== source_run_id (test 6)
POST route returns 404 social_content_job_not_found on cross-tenant (test 7)
POST route returns 403 on missing tenant context (test 8)
source runtime doc preserved (research stage run_id, status, updated_at unchanged) (test 9)

did_not_touch: backend/marketing/hermes-callbacks.ts (Metis: NEVER modify - keeps stage regression rejection intact)
